title: Get Creative!
description: A modpack attempting to focus on transportation of materials using Create!
body:
A modpack attempting to focus on the Create mod plus add-ons, and the transportation of materials using Create!

QoL additions and extra mods like Terralith, Fabric Seasons and structure additions (dungeons and more!) are included for a rich exploration aspect.

In the future I'd like to update ore spawns and add mods focused on machinery and automation with vastly increased recipe costs to promote transporting materials en mass with the Create Excavation mod and trains!
